scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/host-shell" "npm run dev -w apps/shop-remote" "npm run dev -w apps/account-remote" "npm run dev -w apps/cart-remote"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start -w apps/host-shell" "npm run start -w apps/shop-remote" "npm run start -w apps/account-remote" "npm run dev -w apps/cart-remote"
